emails.subject: Re: SITARA TRAINING
emails.body: Re: SITARA TRAINING Russ, I would like for the following people from the Texas region to attend: Liz Bellamy Sabrae Zajak Mary Poorman Susan Hadix Tom Acton Mark McCoy Eddie Janzen Let me know if this group is too large and move some to a later date. Thanks. D Russ Severson 09/08/2000 08:53 AM

emails.subject: Re: SITARA TRAINING
emails.body: Daren The number of interested people turned out to be larger than the room can handle. Can you just send 3 or 4 for this meeting and I will set up a secondary date for the others. Thanks Russ x37386 Forwarded by Russ Severson/HOU/ECT on 09/12/2000 03:16 PM Daren J Farmer 09/08/2000 02:14 PM
